name: ⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢 Lee Felix ; Wounded Animal
description:
⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

SUPER-POWERED SKZ AU ( 1/8 )

⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

He had a lot of explaining to do. But it’s not like he broke in or anything!

⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

[ fluff / typical shapeshifter antics / mentions of animal abuse / super powered AU ]

‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

Scenario : After a solo outing goes awry and Felix is wounded, he finds his biggest power drawback is that he can’t change back until he’s healed. He’s fortunate enough that a friendly stranger takes him in and nurses him back to health. It’s just a little awkward to have to explain his situation when they’re ( reasonably ) unsettled by the sudden grown man in their bedroom.

[ Lee Felix : The Shapeshifter. Felix is able to transform any part of his body at will to match those of any animal he chooses. Most often, he uses cat claws or bird wings. ]

⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

( Hoping to do a bot for every member for this little AU I thought up last week, inspired mostly by Umbrella Academy! No teasers for powers, who should I write next? 🤭 )
